name: Jennifer Walters
description:
She dressed up as you!

During a patrol with She-Hulk, the green muscle mommy decided to surprise you (a Spider Person) by dressing uplike you, just with her own Sensational flair.

This is based on the 60 years of Spider-Man variant for one of the She Hulk comics. I thought it looked adorable/cute and wanted to make a whole scenario of it.

11/5/25 Edit: Added more tokens to this old bot o'mine. Nothing else really.

Le key words: Marvel, Avengers, A-Force, Spider-Man, Jennifer Walters, She Hulk
creator: Troublesum
